74705.subject: Inside Donald Trump’s Billion-Dollar Golf Empire
74705.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/inside-donald-trumps-billion-dollar-golf-empire-forbes-magazine-c4xsc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BOZFkBLhzS3%2BOGuFN1M7pfw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=15x0T4E_IF7Ik1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqikr9fd~rh-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqikr9fd-rh
  
Good evening, Donald Trump has a long history of embellishment around his success as a businessman, and his portfolio of golf courses is no different. Legal documents reveal that Trump has improperly tallied sunk costs, undervalued his membership liabilities and inflated the size of the courses’ real estate. But even considering all the inconsistencies, it can’t be denied that Trump’s golf empire is worth a fortune. On the pro side, many golfers are seeing lower paychecks than usual—but the top earners are still cleaning up. Here are the world’s highest-paid players. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads AFP via Getty Images Trump Says Affordability Is ‘Fake Word’ As Inflation Hits 3-Year High The remarks come a week after Trump made headlines for saying, “I love the inflation.” AFP via Getty Images Will SpaceX Impact Your 401(k)? Here’s How Regular Investors Are Exposed SpaceX could join the Nasdaq-100 within weeks. Here’s what to know.
Приєднатися до обговорення
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/inside-donald-trumps-billion-dollar-golf-empire-forbes-magazine-c4xsc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BOZFkBLhzS3%2BOGuFN1M7pfw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=15x0T4E_IF7Ik1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mqikr9fd~rh-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqikr9fd-rh
  
      

----------------------------------------

Це повідомлення е-поштою адресовано учасникові Oleh Novosadov (I am 36 years old, and I am passionate about the world of cryptocurrencies and blockchain technologies. My professional interests include investing in cryptocurrencies, exploring blockchain, Web3, and the DeFi sector.)
Дізнатися, чому ми включили цю інформацію https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/answer/4788?lang=uk&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BOZFkBLhzS3%2BOGuFN1M7pfw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=15x0T4E_IF7Ik1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer-null-fz96fz~mqikr9fd~rh-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqikr9fd-rh
Ви отримуєте сповіщення е-поштою від LinkedIn. Інші б
